title: Polish Cauliflower Bowl with Intense Sauce
description: A hearty cauliflower bowl dish with an intense polish sauce, a perfect blend of flavors.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss the cauliflower with 2 tablespoons of olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Spread the cauliflower on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
In a large skillet, cook the sliced polish sausage over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the caraway seeds, paprika, and dijon mustard. Cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the sour cream and cook until the sauce is heated through.
To assemble the bowls, place the roasted cauliflower on a plate or bowl, then top with the polish sausage mixture and garnish with chopped parsley.
Note: You can also serve this dish as a side dish or use it as a filling for sandwiches or wraps.
